description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular footprint. The front features a prominent entryway, multiple large windows, and a landscaped area with palm trees and a swimming pool. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stucco, with glass elements for windows and doors. The rear of the bungalow includes additional outdoor space, visible balconies, and a garage entrance. The property is surrounded by greenery, including palm trees and shrubs, enhancing its upscale residential appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a pool, and landscaped surroundings, featuring clean lines and a spacious layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, landscaped entry, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, side windows, and a portion of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear view of the swimming pool, back patio, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional landscaping, side windows, and the flat roof structure.
